data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. ASTON SUSHI has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing second last time beaten one length (29.83). Good beginner assisted by the inside draw. Capable of going well again. 4. SHOOT THE BREEZE had the drop on the lead and went on to be beaten 5.5 lengths into second (23.35) at this track in a Grade 5 over 400m. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last start. Expected to feature. 5. COMPTON LIZZIE jumped from box 8 last time and ran away with an impressive win scoring by 5.5 lengths at this track in a handy 22.96. Has good speed and can quickly clear the tricky draw. Has good box speed and can overcome the tricky draw. Can measure up again. 2. COMPTON ROCKY deserves plenty of thought over this trip.","runners":[1,4,5,2],"exclusive":false}
